campaigns.delete_own_only: You can only delete your own campaigns
campaigns.goal_reached: Campaign has already reached its funding goal
campaigns.invalid_amount: Invalid reward amount. Must be greater than 0.
campaigns.add_reward_forbidden: You can only add rewards to your own campaigns

funding.invalid_amount: Invalid funding amount. Must be greater than 0.
